name: NARUMIYA INTERNATIONAL Co., Ltd.
summary: NARUMIYA INTERNATIONAL Co., Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, manufactures, processes, and sells children's clothing and related products. The company offers clothes for babies, toddlers, and juniors. It also provides logistics management and purchasing of products; packaging and shipment services, including assortment; and products storage, management, transportation, and logistics services. The company offers its products under the ANNA SUI mini, kate spade new york childrenswear, mezzo piano, X-girl Stages, XLARGE KIDS, kladskap, petit main, b.ROOM, sense of wonder, Love & Peace & Money, baby cheer, Sophie la giraffe, Pupil House, Lovetoxic, mezzo piano junior, pom ponette junior, Lindsay, BLUECROSS girls, by LOVEiT, BLUE CROSS, and petit main LIEN brands. As of February 28, 2019, it operated 769 stores in Japan. The company also offers its products online. The company was formerly known as NI Corporation Co., Ltd. and changed its name to NARUMIYA INTERNATIONAL Co., Ltd. in September 1995. NARUMIYA INTERNATIONAL Co., Ltd. was founded in 1995 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
